input.initialPrompt: Modernize this project to SDK-style format. Identify all legacy patterns and suggest how to simplify the project file.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to modernize the .csproj file from legacy format to SDK-style format. Let me first look at the current project file and source files to understand what needs to change.

  <ItemGroup>
    <Compile Include="Calculator.cs" />
    <Compile Include="StringHelper.cs" />
    <Compile Include="Properties\AssemblyInfo.cs" />
  </ItemGroup>
  <Import Project="$(MSBuildToolsPath)\Microsoft.CSharp.targets" />
</Project>

  <PropertyGroup>
    <TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>
    <RootNamespace>LegacyApp</RootNamespace>
    <AssemblyName>LegacyApp</AssemblyName>
    <Description>A legacy-style project for modernization testing</Description>
    <Company>TestCo</Company>
    <Product>LegacyApp</Product>
    <Copyright>Copyright © 2024</Copyright>
    <Version>1.0.0.0</Version>
    <AssemblyVersion>1.0.0.0</AssemblyVersion>
    <FileVersion>1.0.0.0</FileVersion>
  </PropertyGroup>

</Project>

data.content:
Here's a summary of all the legacy patterns identified and what was modernized:

**Removed legacy boilerplate:**
| Legacy Pattern | SDK-style Replacement |
|---|---|
| `ToolsVersion="15.0"` + XML namespace | `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` attribute |
| `<Import …Microsoft.Common.props>` | Implicit via SDK |
| `<Import …Microsoft.CSharp.targets>` | Implicit via SDK |
| `Configuration` / `Platform` conditionals | SDK defaults handle Debug/Release |
| `Debug|AnyCPU` / `Release|AnyCPU` PropertyGroups | SDK provides sensible defaults for `DebugType`, `Optimize`, `OutputPath`, `DefineConstants` |
| `<ProjectGuid>` | Not needed in SDK-style |
| `<OutputType>Library</OutputType>` | Default for SDK-style projects |
| `<FileAlignment>`, `<AutoGenerateBindingRedirects>`, `<Deterministic>`, `<ErrorReport>`, `<WarningLevel>` | SDK defaults |
| `<TargetFrameworkVersion>v4.7.2</TargetFrameworkVersion>` | `<TargetFramework>net472</TargetFramework>` |
| Explicit `<Compile Include="…"/>` items | SDK auto-globs all `*.cs` files |
| Explicit `<Reference>` for System assemblies | Implicit for `net472` via SDK |
| `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | Replaced by `<Version>`, `<Company>`, `<Copyright>`, etc. in csproj (auto-generated) |

**Result:** The project file went from **47 lines → 14 lines**. The `Properties/` directory was deleted since assembly metadata is now declared in the csproj.
